[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100001 3
1 1100001 3
2 0000110 2
3 0111110 5
4 1101001 4
5 0000011 2
6 0000000 a
7 0000000 a

01 10 0101011 4
12 21 1100001 3 match 0 1
23 32 1100001 3 match 0 1
34 43 0000000 a match 6 7
45 54 0000110 2 match 2
56 65 0101000 2
67 76 0000001 1
70 07 0000011 2 match 5

13 31 1100001 3 match 0 1
24 42 0000000 a match 6 7
35 53 0100000 1
46 64 0000000 a match 6 7
57 75 0000010 1
60 06 0101001 3
71 17 0000011 2 match 5

03 30 0100001 2
14 41 0000110 2 match 2
25 52 0100000 1
36 63 1100001 3 match 0 1
47 74 0000010 1
50 05 0111010 4
61 16 1101001 4 match 4
72 27 0000001 1

04 40 0000010 1
15 51 0101110 4
26 62 1100001 3 match 0 1
37 73 0000001 1
